narrative:
DRIVER
USD leads all CSM frames at 100 D1 and 100 H4 in a Risk-Off High regime, driven by inflation fears pushing US 10Y yields to 4.595% and S&P 500 selling off 1.24%. USDCHF is the cleanest expression with D1+H4 Strong Buy, H4 momentum at 78 and rising, and EURUSD correlation at -0.76 confirming broad USD dominance; GBPUSD D1+H4 Sell with GBP CSM at zero amplifies the move via GBPJPY at +0.94 correlation. AUD H4 CSM has collapsed to 26 versus D1 at 65, a 39-point divergence flagged as the most critical short-term signal, meaning AUDUSD and AUDJPY longs built on the daily view are now at immediate risk of reversal.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: USDCAD CMP 60, D1 59 rising sharply, H4 70 trending up with CAD H4 CSM accelerating to 55
Fading: EURUSD CMP 37 with H4 momentum 13 collapsing, GBPUSD CMP 36 H4 13 decelerating, NZDUSD CMP 43 H4 17 fading hard

WATCH
Fed speaker comments on inflation trajectory hit USDJPY directly, D1+H4 Buy setup extends toward resistance if hawkish tone confirmed
Silver breaks below current session low, AUDUSD accelerates sell as commodity currency correlation tightens under copper down 4.15%
Copper closes H4 bar below 6.25, USDCAD H4 Buy at 70 momentum accelerates as CAD commodity base erodes further

themes.theme: Inflation concerns driving bond yields higher
Equities selling off on inflation and policy uncertainty
Agricultural commodities weakness across the board
Energy prices surging on supply disruption concerns
Federal Reserve policy pivot uncertainty under new leadership

key_observation: Dollar strength is being driven by a flight-to-safety bid as bond yields spike on inflation concerns and equity markets decline sharply. Simultaneously, uncertainty around new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh's policy direction is creating volatility. The combination of higher yields and risk-off sentiment is supporting USD despite equity weakness.
watch: Fed policy communications and Treasury yield trajectory. Any clarification from Kevin Warsh on inflation-fighting credentials could be USD positive. Watch for equity stabilization or further deterioration which would impact risk sentiment. Monitor crude oil supply situation for potential stagflationary implications.
